segments.text: Adobe just showed off its new project at
Adobe Max. And this one is a total game
changer. It's called Project Light
Touch. Watch this. Lamp is off. You just
select it, hit relight, and it's on. It
even adds reflections. And you can even
change the brightness. That's fine. But
what if the problem isn't adding light,
but fixing bad light? So, they added
diffuse light. This portrait has harsh
shadow. With one click, the shadows are
gone. It's like having a virtual
softbox. And you can even play around.
But honestly, the real genius is spatial
lighting. This lets you add a new 3D
light to any flat photo. You can move it
around and the shadows change in real
time. But watch this. You can even put
the light inside the object [music] to
create a light that was never there.
Amazing.
